# Copilot Instructions for Python Project

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Project Type: Python Project
  - Language: Python
  - Framework: Standard Library with venv

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Created project structure with main.py, requirements.txt, README.md
  - Virtual environment created in /venv directory

- [x] Customize the Project
  - Hello World starting point with basic project structure

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  - No additional extensions required for basic Python project

- [x] Compile the Project
  - Virtual environment initialized and ready
  - No external dependencies to install yet

- [x] Create and Run Task
  - Created tasks.json with Python execution tasks
  - Default task: "Python: Run main.py"

- [x] Launch the Project
  - Project ready to run using VS Code tasks

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - README.md created with setup instructions
  - copilot-instructions.md updated with completion status
